nasb.text: But I am full of the wrath of the Lord; I am weary with holding it in. “Pour it out on the children in the street And on the gathering of young men together; For both husband and wife shall be taken, The aged and the very old.

esv.text: Therefore I am full of the wrath of the Lord; I am weary of holding it in. “Pour it out upon the children in the street, and upon the gatherings of young men, also; both husband and wife shall be taken, the elderly and the very aged.

cnv.text: 因此，我心裡充滿耶和華的忿怒， 無法容忍。 “你要把我的忿怒向街上的孩童傾倒， 又傾在聯群集結的年輕人身上。 夫妻一起被捉住， 年老的、壽高的也不例外。

ccb.text: 耶和华啊，我怒你所怒， 无法容忍。 耶和华说：“你把我的怒气发向街头的孩童和聚集成群的青年。 丈夫、妻子和老人都要一同被掳。
